message:
perf(output): use larger buffer for JSON streaming

The large list JSON path was already streaming output, but the default 8 KiB BufWriter fragmented a full backlog response into hundreds of stdout writes. Use a 128 KiB buffer for compact and pretty JSON modes so large machine-readable responses flush in fewer chunks without allocating the whole JSON payload.

Measured on the copied current .beads DB with release-perf:
- list --json --all --limit 0: 35.9 ms +/- 1.3 -> 34.7 ms +/- 1.4
- stdout write syscalls: 456 -> 29
- list JSON checksum unchanged: 41dedb3333ea8e8a41783d6978c2191ef14e04ba937e64050a7126d8c77955a0
